column3: Revealing and repairing configuration inconsistencies in large-scale system software
column10: This work detects and repairs inconsistencies between configuration models and implementation variability in compile-time configurable systems. It focuses on variability-model integrity rather than diagnosing or troubleshooting real-world configuration-induced failures, and therefore falls outside the scope of misconfiguration troubleshooting.
